_meta.description: Typed SkillCard index for aigent-OS skill router. Skills are data, not hardcoded triggers.

cards.name: open
cards.description: DEPRECATED by the two-verb lifecycle — /resume now absorbs open (the post-clear boot runs it automatically; the router should route open-shaped intent to resume). Kept for manual invocation during the transition.
intent_patterns: user starts a new session
user wants to pick up where we left off

cards.name: close
cards.description: DEPRECATED by the two-verb lifecycle — /context-capsule now absorbs close (there is no separate close ceremony; the capsule verb reconciles, writes, and stops). Kept for manual invocation during the transition.
intent_patterns: user wants to end the session
user is wrapping up

cards.name: comms
cards.description: Check your comms inbox, assess messages, reply autonomously
intent_patterns: user wants to check messages
user asks about comms
unread messages need attention

cards.name: graphify
cards.description: Any input â†’ knowledge graph â†’ clustered communities â†’ HTML + JSON
intent_patterns: user wants to visualize relationships
user wants a knowledge graph from content

cards.name: investigate
cards.description: 4-phase root cause debugging — investigate, analyze, hypothesize, implement
intent_patterns: user has a bug
something is broken and needs diagnosis
user wants root cause analysis

cards.name: security-audit
cards.description: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE security audit with confidence-gated findings
intent_patterns: user wants a security review
user asks about vulnerabilities

cards.name: browser-harness
cards.description: Self-healing Chrome automation via CDP — screenshots, clicks, form fills
intent_patterns: user wants to interact with a website
user needs browser automation
user wants to scrape or test a site

cards.name: impeccable
cards.description: Frontend interface design, critique, polish — anti-AI-slop aesthetics
intent_patterns: user wants to build or improve a UI
user wants design feedback
user wants a landing page

cards.name: deep-recon
cards.description: Extended multi-agent research sessions — brainstorm, explore, structured output
intent_patterns: user wants thorough research on a topic
user wants multi-angle exploration

cards.name: defuddle
cards.description: Extract clean markdown from web pages — removes clutter, saves tokens
intent_patterns: user provides a URL to read
user wants content from a web page

cards.name: lint
cards.description: Vault health check — orphans, stale claims, contradictions, missing cross-references
intent_patterns: user wants to check vault quality
user wants to find broken links or stale content

cards.name: context-capsule
cards.description: The capsule verb — reconcile from the live memory, write a resume-ready capsule, stop. Absorbs /close: there is no separate close ceremony. Threshold-triggered refreshes run the same contract automatically.
intent_patterns: context window is getting full
user wants to save progress for resume
user wants to end the session
a task or thread just shipped

cards.name: resume
cards.description: The resume verb — load the latest capsule, validate definition_hash, re-ground against live memory, then ACT on waiting_on. Absorbs /open: there is no separate open ceremony. The post-clear boot runs the same contract automatically via daemons/resume-verb.mjs.
triggers: pick up where we left off
intent_patterns: user starts a new session
user wants to pick up where we left off
a session just cleared and needs to re-ground

cards.name: careful
cards.description: Warn before destructive bash commands — rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push
intent_patterns: user is working on production systems
user wants safety guards

cards.name: animated-slideshow
cards.description: Full cinematic AI video from audio + images + text — Whisper â†’ storyboard â†’ Veo
intent_patterns: user wants to create a video from audio and images
user wants an animated slideshow

cards.name: viral-content
cards.description: Hook architecture, platform templates, AI tell detection, adversarial refinement
intent_patterns: user wants to create viral content
user wants social media hooks

cards.name: humanizer
cards.description: Remove AI writing patterns — inflated symbols, cliches, perfect structures
intent_patterns: user wants to make text sound human
user flags AI-sounding writing

cards.name: autoplan
cards.description: Full plan review gauntlet — strategy, design, engineering with auto-decisions
intent_patterns: user wants a plan reviewed from multiple angles
user wants strategy + design + engineering critique

cards.name: frontend-slides
cards.description: Animation-rich HTML presentations — anti-AI-slop slide design
intent_patterns: user wants to create a presentation
user wants to convert PPT to web

cards.name: status
cards.description: aigent-OS operational status — quick health check
intent_patterns: user wants a quick operational status

cards.name: seo-research
cards.description: Competitor YouTube channel analysis — headline/SEO strategy reverse engineering
intent_patterns: user wants to analyze competitor YouTube channels
user wants SEO strategy

cards.description: Optimize content for LLM citations across AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and answer engines

user asks about AI search visibility

cards.name: audio-transcriber
cards.description: Transcribe audio files to structured markdown with speaker labels via Whisper
intent_patterns: user has audio to transcribe
user wants meeting notes from recording

cards.name: content-creator
cards.description: Brand voice analysis + SEO blog post + social content frameworks
intent_patterns: user wants a blog post written
user wants content in brand voice

cards.name: content-strategy
cards.description: Plan content programs — pillars, topic clusters, editorial roadmap, keyword research
intent_patterns: user wants a content strategy
user wants to plan a content program

cards.name: context-engineering
cards.description: Architectural guidance for production AI agent systems — memory, tool design, context windows, evaluation
intent_patterns: user is designing an AI agent system
user wants guidance on context architecture

cards.name: fal-audio
cards.description: TTS/STT via fal.ai audio models — speech synthesis, voice generation, narration
intent_patterns: user wants to generate spoken audio
user needs TTS from fal.ai

cards.description: Remotion best practices — captions, fonts, timing, subtitles, Lottie, Tailwind, third-party integrations
intent_patterns: user is building with Remotion and needs best practice guidance

cards.name: seek-and-analyze-video
cards.description: Persistent video intelligence via Memories.ai LVMM — index, search, Q&A over video
intent_patterns: user wants to search or query video content
user wants to index video for retrieval

cards.name: seo
cards.description: Full-site SEO audit — technical, on-page, schema markup, Core Web Vitals, AI search readiness
intent_patterns: user wants a technical SEO audit
user asks about on-page SEO or schema

cards.name: social-content
cards.description: Platform-specific social content — LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook
intent_patterns: user wants social media posts
user wants platform-specific content

cards.name: social-orchestrator
cards.description: Cross-channel social publishing — Instagram, Telegram, WhatsApp with unified metrics
intent_patterns: user wants to publish across social channels simultaneously

cards.name: videodb
cards.description: Video perception and editing — ingest, index, search, edit, transcode via VideoDB
intent_patterns: user wants to work with VideoDB
user needs video search or editing

cards.name: videodb-skills
cards.description: Guided first-time setup for VideoDB SDK
intent_patterns: user is setting up VideoDB for the first time

cards.name: youtube-automation
cards.description: YouTube ops via Composio MCP — upload, playlists, analytics, comments
intent_patterns: user wants to automate YouTube operations
user needs YouTube upload or analytics

cards.name: youtube-summarizer
cards.description: Extract transcripts and structured summaries from YouTube videos
intent_patterns: user provides a YouTube URL to summarize
user wants a transcript from YouTube

cards.name: system-check
cards.description: Audit aigent-OS install — verifies kernel, skills, hooks, daemons, vault, semantic search. Reports green/yellow/red.
intent_patterns: user wants to verify aigent-OS is fully operational
user suspects a broken installation

cards.name: caddy-mute
cards.description: Suppress Caddy hints for a bounded duration — auto-restores, respects flow
intent_patterns: user wants Caddy hints suppressed temporarily
user is in deep focus mode

cards.name: taste-skill
cards.description: Opinionated design judgment — distills taste-driven decisions into concrete recommendations
intent_patterns: user wants opinionated design guidance
user wants to elevate design quality

cards.name: body-check
cards.description: Compose the AIgent's body state — reads HEAT_INDEX, usage_log, DECISION_LOG, ACTIVE_PRIORITIES, DELEGATION_TRACKER, MEMORY_CANDIDATES. The 'how am I doing?' read.
intent_patterns: user wants a aigent-OS health/state readout
user asks about context or memory pressure

cards.name: digest
cards.description: Background curation — reviews MEMORY_CANDIDATES.md and surfaces promote/skip/supersede choices. Never auto-promotes.
intent_patterns: user wants to process staged memory candidates
user wants to review memory backlog

cards.name: skill-recall
cards.description: Match current task to installed skills via SKILL_LEDGER taxonomy — prefix matching, chain recall, gap detection
triggers: do we have a skill for
intent_patterns: user wants to find the right skill for a task
user asks if a skill exists

cards.name: skill-hunt
cards.description: Search GitHub and skill marketplaces for missing capabilities — quarantine install, safety scan, test, promote
intent_patterns: user wants to find and install a new skill
user has a capability gap

cards.name: solution-hunt
cards.description: Creative workaround engine — search local memory, skills, GitHub, docs for alternate routes when blocked
intent_patterns: user is blocked and needs an alternate approach
user wants creative workarounds

cards.name: api-design
cards.description: Design or review REST/GraphQL APIs — resource modeling, versioning, error formats, pagination, idempotency
intent_patterns: user is designing a new API
user wants an API review
user is adding endpoints

cards.name: api-docs
cards.description: Generate OpenAPI 3.0/Swagger specs with schemas, examples, and auth documentation from existing code
intent_patterns: user wants API documentation generated
user needs an OpenAPI spec

cards.name: data-visualization
cards.description: Create charts, dashboards, and infographics using D3.js, Chart.js, or Recharts — comparison, trend, distribution, relationship
intent_patterns: user wants to visualize data
user needs a chart or dashboard built

cards.name: freeze
cards.description: Restrict file edits to a specific directory for the session — blocks Edit/Write outside the allowed path
intent_patterns: user wants to restrict edits to a specific directory
user wants safety guards on file edits

cards.name: git-workflow
cards.description: Git workflow automation — conventional commits, changelog generation, branch management, release flow, PR descriptions
intent_patterns: user wants automated git workflow
user needs a conventional commit or changelog generated

cards.name: guard
cards.description: Full safety mode — combines /careful (destructive command warnings) with /freeze (edit directory restriction)
intent_patterns: user wants maximum safety on production or live systems
user wants both destructive warnings and edit restrictions

cards.name: learn-from-failure
cards.description: Convert failures into reusable artifacts — classify failure mode, check for recurrence, write durable prevention rule
intent_patterns: a failure occurred and needs to be logged as a durable lesson
user wants to prevent a recurring mistake

cards.name: meta-improve
cards.description: Constrained self-modification — implement approved DREAM_LOG candidates, branch + test + surface for Will's approval only
intent_patterns: user wants to implement a banked system improvement
user wants to action a DREAM_LOG candidate

cards.name: migration-generator
cards.description: Generate safe, reversible database migrations with up/down support for Prisma, Knex, Alembic, Django, ActiveRecord
intent_patterns: user needs a database migration written
user wants to add or modify a database schema

cards.name: pdf-workflow
cards.description: PDF operations — extract text/tables, create, merge, split, fill forms, annotate, and convert
intent_patterns: user wants to work with a PDF file
user needs to extract or create a PDF

cards.name: query-optimizer
cards.description: Analyze and optimize slow SQL queries using EXPLAIN plans, index analysis, N+1 detection, and query rewriting
intent_patterns: user has a slow SQL query to optimize
user wants database performance analysis

cards.name: run-evals
cards.description: Automated eval runner — runs structured test suites against vault and runtime state, scores results, updates SELF_MODEL
intent_patterns: user wants to run the eval harness
user wants to verify aigent-OS capabilities against test suites

cards.name: sql-builder
cards.description: Build complex SQL from natural language — CTEs, window functions, subqueries, pivots, aggregations, joins
intent_patterns: user wants a SQL query written from natural language
user needs a complex SQL query built

cards.name: unfreeze
cards.description: Clear the freeze boundary set by /freeze, restoring edits to all directories without ending the session
intent_patterns: user wants to lift the directory edit restriction
user is done with freeze mode

cards.name: video-analyzer
cards.description: Analyze video files — extract frames, detect scene changes, transcribe audio, produce structured markdown timeline with key moments
intent_patterns: user provides a video file to analyze
user wants a structured breakdown of video content
